name: Detroit Diesel DTC starter (J1939 SPN-FMI + GHG17)

dtcs.description: Detroit — Accelerator pedal position sensor 1 voltage low
Detroit — Engine intake manifold pressure circuit voltage high
Detroit — Fuel rail pressure sensor circuit voltage low
Detroit — Aftertreatment 1 SCR catalyst NOx inlet high
Detroit — DPF differential pressure above normal range
Detroit — DEF dosing valve circuit voltage low
Detroit — DEF tank level inducement (warning derate)
